title: Iowa alumnus nominated for Tony Award
summary_en: University of Iowa alumnus Samuel D. Hunter’s Broadway debut, Little Bear Ridge Road, received a Tony Award nomination for Best Play on May 5.
title_cn: Iowa alumnus nominated for Tony Award

title: A new way to capture water — from air and with sunlight
summary_en: Chemists at the University of Iowa have created a light-activated structure that captures and stores water from the air. The millimeter-scale lattice forms tiny cavities under ultraviolet light. While still a proof of concept, the approach could lead to water-harvesting technologies.
title_cn: A new way to capture water — from air and with sunlight

title: reSPARC to enter implementation phase of revenue, efficiency initiatives
summary_en: The University of Iowa is advancing its reSPARC initiative into a new phase focused on implementation, building on nearly a year of cross-campus collaboration to strengthen the university’s financial future.
title_cn: reSPARC to enter implementation phase of revenue, efficiency initiatives
